The greatest fighter of all time isn’t just in the ring… he’s in the box! 🥊

Every Sugar Factory Rainbow Sliders box includes a mystery rubber duck. There are five standard ducks at varying rarity levels, and ultra-exclusive limited edition ducks, such as the Mike Tyson duck!
But it’s all luck 🍀 Sugar Factory Rainbow Sliders are a knock out! 

Will you pull the Tyson duck?

Sugar Factory Rainbow Sliders now at Jewel-Osco!

MIKE TYSON x RAINBOW SLIDERS 🥊🍔🌈

The world-famous Sugar Factory Rainbow Sliders are officially landing at Jewel-Osco! Come meet the Brand Ambassador, Mike Tyson, at the big launch event in Stickney.

📍 Location: 7122 40th St, Stickney, IL 60402

🗓️ Date: April 10th

🕛 Time: 12:00 PM

Stock your freezer with the most iconic sliders on the planet and meet the Champ! See you there. 🥊
